# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL to download the build artifact (supports S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SHA-256 checksum of the artifact for integrity verification'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'TARGET_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of production server hostnames (e.g., prod1.example.com,prod2.example.com)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases',
            description: 'Deployment path on target servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SERVICE_NAME',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Name of the service to restart after deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Perform a dry run without actual deployment'
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'DEPLOY_CREDENTIALS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SSH credentials for deployment to production servers',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl',
            required: true
        )
        credentials(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Credentials for accessing artifact repository (optional)',
            credentialType: 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials.impl.UsernamePasswordCredentialsImpl',
            required: false
        )
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        ALLOWED_DOMAINS_FILE = "${WORKSPACE}/allowed_domains.txt"
        DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        timestamps()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateParameters()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Validate URL Security') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateUrlSecurity(params.ARTIFACT_URL)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Approval Gate') {
            when {
                expression { params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' && !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def approver = input(
                        message: "Approve deployment to PRODUCTION?",
                        submitter: 'admin,release-managers',
                        submitterParameter: 'approver',
                        parameters: [
                            string(
                                name: 'APPROVAL_REASON',
                                defaultValue: '',
                                description: 'Reason for approval'
                            )
                        ]
                    )
                    echo "Deployment approved by: ${approver}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    downloadArtifact()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifact Integrity') {
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyArtifactIntegrity()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Scan Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    scanArtifact()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN: Would deploy to servers: ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS}"
                        echo "DRY RUN: Deploy path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                        echo "DRY RUN: Service to restart: ${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                    } else {
                        deployToServers()
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            when {
                expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyDeployment()
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                // Clean up artifacts from workspace
                sh """
                    rm -rf "${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                """
                echo "Workspace cleaned up"
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment FAILED to ${params.TARGET_ENVIRONMENT}"
            script {
                if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo "Consider running rollback procedure"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

def validateParameters() {
    def errors = []

    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_URL is required")
    }

    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM is required for integrity verification")
    } else if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.matches('^[a-fA-F0-9]{64}$')) {
        errors.add("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM must be a valid SHA-256 hash (64 hex characters)")
    }

    if (!params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS?.trim()) {
        errors.add("PRODUCTION_SERVERS is required")
    } else {
        // Validate server hostnames - only allow alphanumeric, dots, hyphens
        def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',')
        servers.each { server ->
            def trimmed = server.trim()
            if (!trimmed.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9.\\-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$')) {
                errors.add("Invalid server hostname: ${trimmed}")
            }
        }
    }

    if (!params.DEPLOY_PATH?.trim()) {
        errors.add("DEPLOY_PATH is required")
    } else {
        // Validate deploy path - prevent path traversal
        def normalizedPath = params.DEPLOY_PATH.replaceAll('/+', '/')
        if (normalizedPath.contains('..') || !normalizedPath.startsWith('/opt/')) {
            errors.add("DEPLOY_PATH must be an absolute path under /opt/ and cannot contain '..'")
        }
        if (normalizedPath.matches('.*[;&|`\$\\\\].*')) {
            errors.add("DEPLOY_PATH contains invalid characters")
        }
    }

    if (!params.SERVICE_NAME?.trim()) {
        errors.add("SERVICE_NAME is required")
    } else {
        if (!params.SERVICE_NAME.matches('^[a-zA-Z0-9_\\-]+$')) {
            errors.add("SERVICE_NAME contains invalid characters (only alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores allowed)")
        }
    }

    if (errors.size() > 0) {
        error("Parameter validation failed:\n${errors.join('\n')}")
    }

    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
}

def validateUrlSecurity(String url) {
    // Define allowed URL schemes
    def allowedSchemes = ['https', 's3']

    // Parse the URL
    def parsedUrl
    try {
        parsedUrl = new URI(url)
    } catch (Exception e) {
        error("Invalid URL format: ${url}")
    }

    def scheme = parsedUrl.getScheme()?.toLowerCase()
    if (!scheme) {
        error("URL must have a scheme (e.g., https://)")
    }

    if (!allowedSchemes.contains(scheme)) {
        error("URL scheme '${scheme}' is not allowed. Allowed schemes: ${allowedSchemes.join(', ')}")
    }

    // Define allowed domains/hosts (whitelist approach)
    def allowedDomains = [
        'artifacts.example.com',
        'artifactory.example.com',
        's3.amazonaws.com',
        's3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com',
        's3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com',
        'my-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com'
    ]

    def host = parsedUrl.getHost()?.toLowerCase()
    if (!host) {
        error("URL must contain a valid hostname")
    }

    // Check against allowed domains
    def isAllowed = allowedDomains.any { domain ->
        host == domain || host.endsWith(".${domain}")
    }

    if (!isAllowed) {
        error("Host '${host}' is not in the allowed domains list. Allowed: ${allowedDomains.join(', ')}")
    }

    // Prevent SSRF - check for private/internal IPs
    try {
        def addresses = InetAddress.getAllByName(host)
        addresses.each { addr ->
            if (addr.isLoopbackAddress() || addr.isLinkLocalAddress() ||
                addr.isSiteLocalAddress() || addr.isAnyLocalAddress()) {
                error("URL resolves to a private/internal IP address. This is not allowed.")
            }
        }
    } catch (UnknownHostException e) {
        error("Cannot resolve hostname: ${host}")
    }

    // Check for URL path traversal
    def path = parsedUrl.getPath() ?: ''
    if (path.contains('..') || path.contains('//')) {
        error("URL path contains suspicious patterns (path traversal attempt)")
    }

    // Reject URLs with credentials embedded
    if (parsedUrl.getUserInfo()) {
        error("URLs with embedded credentials are not allowed. Use the ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS parameter instead.")
    }

    echo "URL security validation passed for: ${host}"
}

def downloadArtifact() {
    sh "mkdir -p '${ARTIFACT_DIR}'"

    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
    def parsedUrl = new URI(url)
    def scheme = parsedUrl.getScheme()?.toLowerCase()

    // Extract filename from URL, sanitize it
    def rawFilename = parsedUrl.getPath().split('/').last()
    def filename = rawFilename.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._\\-]', '_')
    if (!filename || filename == '_') {
        filename = "artifact_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"
    }

    env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME = filename
    def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${filename}"

    echo "Downloading artifact: ${filename}"

    if (scheme == 's3') {
        // Use AWS CLI for S3 downloads
        withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding',
                          credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS ?: 'aws-credentials']]) {
            sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                aws s3 cp '${url}' '${artifactPath}' --no-progress
            """
        }
    } else if (scheme == 'https') {
        if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS?.trim()) {
            withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS,
                usernameVariable: 'ART_USER',
                passwordVariable: 'ART_PASS'
            )]) {
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    curl --fail --silent --show-error \
                        --location \
                        --max-time 600 \
                        --max-redirs 3 \
                        --proto '=https' \
                        --user "\${ART_USER}:\${ART_PASS}" \
                        --output '${artifactPath}' \
                        '${url}'
                """
            }
        } else {
            sh """
                set -euo pipefail
                curl --fail --silent --show-error \
                    --location \
                    --max-time 600 \
                    --max-redirs 3 \
                    --proto '=https' \
                    --output '${artifactPath}' \
                    '${url}'
            """
        }
    }

    // Verify file was downloaded and is not empty
    sh """
        set -euo pipefail
        if [ ! -f '${artifactPath}' ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Artifact file not found after download"
            exit 1
        fi
        FILE_SIZE=\$(stat -c%s '${artifactPath}' 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z '${artifactPath}')
        if [ "\${FILE_SIZE}" -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Downloaded artifact is empty"
            exit 1
        fi
        echo "Downloaded artifact size: \${FILE_SIZE} bytes"
    """

    echo "Artifact downloaded successfully: ${artifactPath}"
}

def verifyArtifactIntegrity() {
    def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"
    def expectedChecksum = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim().toLowerCase()

    echo "Verifying SHA-256 checksum of artifact..."

    def actualChecksum = sh(
        script: """
            set -euo pipefail
            sha256sum '${artifactPath}' | awk '{print \$1}'
        """,
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim().toLowerCase()

    if (actualChecksum != expectedChecksum) {
        // Remove the compromised artifact
        sh "rm -f '${artifactPath}'"
        error("""
            INTEGRITY CHECK FAILED!
            Expected SHA-256: ${expectedChecksum}
            Actual SHA-256:   ${actualChecksum}
            The artifact has been removed. Deployment aborted.
        """)
    }

    echo "Checksum verification PASSED: ${actualChecksum}"
}

def scanArtifact() {
    def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"

    echo "Scanning artifact for security issues..."

    // Check file type to ensure it's an expected format
    def fileType = sh(
        script: """
            set -euo pipefail
            file --brief --mime-type '${artifactPath}'
        """,
        returnStdout: true
    ).trim()

    def allowedMimeTypes = [
        'application/java-archive',
        'application/zip',
        'application/gzip',
        'application/x-tar',
        'application/x-gzip',
        'application/x-compressed-tar',
        'application/octet-stream'
    ]

    if (!allowedMimeTypes.contains(fileType)) {
        error("Artifact has unexpected MIME type: ${fileType}. Allowed types: ${allowedMimeTypes.join(', ')}")
    }

    echo "File type check passed: ${fileType}"

    // Run ClamAV scan if available
    def clamavAvailable = sh(script: 'which clamscan 2>/dev/null', returnStatus: true) == 0
    if (clamavAvailable) {
        def scanResult = sh(
            script: """
                set -euo pipefail
                clamscan --no-summary '${artifactPath}'
            """,
            returnStatus: true
        )
        if (scanResult != 0) {
            sh "rm -f '${artifactPath}'"
            error("ClamAV detected a threat in the artifact! Deployment aborted.")
        }
        echo "ClamAV scan passed"
    } else {
        echo "WARNING: ClamAV not available, skipping virus scan"
    }

    // Check artifact size limits (e.g., max 2GB)
    sh """
        set -euo pipefail
        MAX_SIZE=2147483648
        FILE_SIZE=\$(stat -c%s '${artifactPath}' 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z '${artifactPath}')
        if [ "\${FILE_SIZE}" -gt "\${MAX_SIZE}" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Artifact exceeds maximum allowed size (2GB)"
            exit 1
        fi
    """

    echo "Artifact security scan completed"
}

def deployToServers() {
    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
    def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}"
    def deployPath = params.DEPLOY_PATH.replaceAll('/+', '/').replaceAll('/$', '')
    def serviceName = params.SERVICE_NAME.trim()
    def releasePath = "${deployPath}/${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"

    def deploymentResults = [:]

    echo "Starting deployment to ${servers.size()} server(s)..."

    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(
        credentialsId: params.DEPLOY_CREDENTIALS,
        keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
        usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
    )]) {
        for (server in servers) {
            echo "Deploying to ${server}..."

            try {
                // Create release directory on remote server
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        -o ServerAliveInterval=15 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "mkdir -p '${releasePath}'"
                """

                // Transfer artifact using SCP
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        '${artifactPath}' \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}:${releasePath}/"
                """

                // Verify checksum on remote server
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    REMOTE_CHECKSUM=\$(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "sha256sum '${releasePath}/${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' | awk '{print \\\$1}'")

                    if [ "\${REMOTE_CHECKSUM}" != "${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.trim().toLowerCase()}" ]; then
                        echo "ERROR: Remote checksum mismatch on ${server}"
                        exit 1
                    fi
                    echo "Remote checksum verified on ${server}"
                """

                // Extract artifact and update symlink atomically
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "cd '${releasePath}' && \
                         if file --mime-type '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' | grep -q 'application/.*\\(zip\\|tar\\|gzip\\|java-archive\\)'; then \
                             if echo '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' | grep -qE '\\.(tar\\.gz|tgz)\$'; then \
                                 tar xzf '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}'; \
                             elif echo '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' | grep -qE '\\.zip\$'; then \
                                 unzip -o '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}'; \
                             elif echo '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}' | grep -qE '\\.tar\$'; then \
                                 tar xf '${env.ARTIFACT_FILENAME}'; \
                             fi; \
                         fi && \
                         ln -sfn '${releasePath}' '${deployPath}/current'"
                """

                // Restart service
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "sudo systemctl restart '${serviceName}'"
                """

                // Clean up old releases (keep last 5)
                sh """
                    set -euo pipefail
                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                        -o BatchMode=yes \
                        -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                        -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                        "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                        "cd '${deployPath}' && ls -dt */ 2>/dev/null | tail -n +6 | xargs -r rm -rf"
                """

                deploymentResults[server] = 'SUCCESS'
                echo "Deployment to ${server} completed successfully"

            } catch (Exception e) {
                deploymentResults[server] = 'FAILED'
                echo "ERROR: Deployment to ${server} failed: ${e.getMessage()}"

                // Attempt rollback on failed server
                try {
                    echo "Attempting rollback on ${server}..."
                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "cd '${deployPath}' && \
                             PREVIOUS=\\\$(ls -dt */ 2>/dev/null | grep -v '${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}' | head -1 | tr -d '/') && \
                             if [ -n \\\"\\\${PREVIOUS}\\\" ]; then \
                                 ln -sfn '${deployPath}/'\\\${PREVIOUS} '${deployPath}/current' && \
                                 sudo systemctl restart '${serviceName}'; \
                             fi && \
                             rm -rf '${releasePath}'"
                    """
                    echo "Rollback on ${server} completed"
                } catch (Exception rollbackEx) {
                    echo "WARNING: Rollback on ${server} also failed: ${rollbackEx.getMessage()}"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Report results
    echo "\n========== DEPLOYMENT RESULTS =========="
    deploymentResults.each { server, result ->
        echo "${server}: ${result}"
    }
    echo "========================================"

    def failedServers = deploymentResults.findAll { it.value == 'FAILED' }
    if (failedServers.size() > 0) {
        error("Deployment failed on ${failedServers.size()} server(s): ${failedServers.keySet().join(', ')}")
    }
}

def verifyDeployment() {
    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
    def serviceName = params.SERVICE_NAME.trim()
    def verificationErrors = []

    echo "Verifying deployment on all servers..."

    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(
        credentialsId: params.DEPLOY_CREDENTIALS,
        keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
        usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER'
    )]) {
        for (server in servers) {
            try {
                // Check if service is running
                def serviceStatus = sh(
                    script: """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "systemctl is-active '${serviceName}'"
                    """,
                    returnStdout: true
                ).trim()

                if (serviceStatus != 'active') {
                    verificationErrors.add("${server}: Service '${serviceName}' is not active (status: ${serviceStatus})")
                } else {
                    echo "${server}: Service '${serviceName}' is active"
                }

                // Verify symlink points to current release
                def currentLink = sh(
                    script: """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=yes \
                            -o BatchMode=yes \
                            -o ConnectTimeout=10 \
                            -i "\${SSH_KEY}" \
                            "\${SSH_USER}@${server}" \
                            "readlink -f '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/current'"
                    """,
                    returnStdout: true
                ).trim()

                if (!currentLink.contains(DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP)) {
                    verificationErrors.add("${server}: Current symlink does not point to expected release")
                } else {
                    echo "${server}: Symlink verified - pointing to ${currentLink}"
                }

            } catch (Exception e) {
                verificationErrors.add("${server}: Verification failed - ${e.getMessage()}")
            }
        }
    }

    if (verificationErrors.size() > 0) {
        echo "\n========== VERIFICATION ERRORS =========="
        verificationErrors.each { echo it }
        echo "=========================================="
        error("Post-deployment verification failed with ${verificationErrors.size()} error(s)")
    }

    echo "All deployment verifications passed successfully"
}
